item.title: Aussies slump to historic series defeat against Bangladesh after shocking start
item.description: Never before had Australia started an ODI losing three wickets for zero runs - but that unwanted piece of history set the tone.

item.title: Why the Socceroos’ next golden generation is closer than you think
item.description: Aussie legend Mark Schwarzer has identified a number of stars ready to make their mark at the World Cup.

item.title: Labor and Liberal politicians in fiery clash as One Nation raises millions in snap fundraiser
item.description: Pauline Hanson has called in the auditors after her Fire The Liar campaign raked in $2.7 million.

item.title: Rhylee Stephen bares soul for partner, Matthew Bielefeld, after fatal accident in Finke Desert Race
item.description: Matthew Bielefeld’s ‘soulmate’ has shared painful details about the race, and a trophy she’s keeping close to her heart.

item.title: Yarrabilba bakery attack: Teen charged after Rainbow Bakery owner Long Kry allegedly struck with rock
item.description: The breakthrough comes days after confronting footage emerged from the violent incident.

item.title: New Zealand cricket legend Kane Williamson calls time on glittering career mid-series
item.description: One of the modern greats of the game has announced his retirement, effective immediately.

item.title: Locals fighting AI data centre expansion plans near their Melbourne homes
item.description: Locals claim the proposal would make it harder to live in the suburban community.

item.title: Young Aussie’s advice after switching to a ‘dumbphone’ and escaping modern technology: ‘Destroy it’
item.description: Despite losing a majority of his connections, he says his life improved.

item.title: Concerns raised over new TGA regulations for therapy using MDMA and magic mushrooms
item.description: The changes could set back progress made with the world-leading treatment, says an expert.

item.title: Elon Musk crowned world’s first trillionaire as SpaceX skyrockets in Wall Street debut
item.description: The South African tech mogul has amassed more wealth than the GDP of all but 21 countries.

item.title: Hilarious moment elephant pees all over floor at Texas Republican rally
item.description: The animal was led through the rally ahead of a hotly-contested political race.

item.title: Cooked Scampi Shrimp Head-On Shell-On recalled in Victoria over chemical contamination risk
item.description: Eating this product could cause illness or injury.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: One Nation is leading primary polling as analysts say it will shake the two-party stronghold
item.description: Analysts warn the old political duopoly is crumbling and a volatile, unpredictable election future is taking shape.

item.title: Australians warned as scammers use artificial intelligence to crack passwords faster than ever
item.description: Think your password is safe? Think again.

item.title: Aussies send powerful message against South Africa to start T20 World Cup on a high
item.description: Georgia Wareham made important runs with the bat before taking over with the ball and in the field.

item.title: Tommy Fury and Molly-Mae reveal son’s name before boxing match win
item.description: Molly-Mae had hinted the much-anticipated name reveal would come during Fury’s bout.

item.title: Driver killed in Australian motorsport tragedy at Calder Park
item.description: Emergency services were called to the racetrack but the competitor tragically died at the scene.

item.title: Jalen Brunson leads New York Knicks to historic NBA title over Victor Wembanyama’s San Antonio Spurs
item.description: The Knicks have finally ended their 53-year championship drought with another thriller against San Antonio.

item.title: Why this pilot says it’s OK to change careers in your 30s
item.description: ‘It was the best thing I’ve ever done.’

item.title: US President Donald Trump mulls inaugural flight of new Air Force One at Mount Rushmore July 4 event
item.description: The jet was a controversial gift from Qatar.

item.title: Police called almost daily to Adelaide’s Novar Gardens Housing Trust complex as crime surges
item.description: A grandmother lives in fear of drug users as police attend daily callouts.

item.title: Young Australians are ditching social media for real-world connections and friendships
item.description: Tired of endless scrolling and feeling lonelier than ever? You're not alone.

item.title: Oscar Piastri ‘collapse’ in spotlight as Lewis Hamilton fulfils Ferrari dream with Barcelona Grand Prix victory
item.description: The Aussie ‘has taken a bit of a plunge’ and the F1 world is taking notice of the ‘strange’ situation.

item.title: Emerging star Cooper Connolly suffers crushing end to massive knock after body goes into ‘shock’
item.description: The 22-year-old was ‘quite upset’ with himself when he suddenly struggled to move just moments from securing victory.

item.title: Giant-killing world No.76 Kamil Majchrzak ‘too good’ for Alex de Minaur in ATP s’Hertogenbosch final
item.description: Australia’s world No.6 was powerless to stop himself from becoming the new champion’s third top-10 victim in three days.

item.title: Ebola cases surge to nearly 800 as death toll rises in DRC
item.description: Local authorities believe the number of cases may be higher as ongoing conflict has hampered contact tracing efforts.

item.title: Where to lock in a cheap internet plan ahead of July 1
item.description: Here are the top plans you will want to lock in.

item.title: Nathan Lyon defiant in push to play every Test in busy schedule after ‘traumatic’ injury
item.description: ‘I saw George’s comments, he’s had a phone call. I’ve seen Andrew’s comments, he’s had a phone call.’

item.title: UK set to follow Australia’s lead with under 16s social media restrictions
item.description: PM Keir Starmer said it’s time to ‘call time on a system that’s failing our kids’.

item.title: Justin Gaethje shocks Ilia Topuria in historic White House UFC Freedom 250 bout
item.description: On Donald Trump’s 80th birthday, the US President hosted some of the globe’s most famous people at the fight.

item.title: Norway crown princess’ son Marius Borg Hoiby jailed for four years for rape
item.description: Marius Borg Hoiby pleaded not guilty to the most severe accusations against him, including those of rape, while admitting to some lesser ones, and can appeal the verdict.

item.title: Gold Coast mental health nurse charged with sexually assaulting and stalking teenage patients denied bail
item.description: Police intercepted the 58-year-old at an international airport as he allegedly tried to board a flight to China with a one-way-ticket.

item.title: Renewed hope for Australia-first proton therapy centre, with Melbourne emerging as potential future home
item.description: For years Australian families have been forced overseas. But that could be about to change.

item.title: Beloved TV mum Anne Schedeen from hit series ALF dies aged 77
item.description: The actress was best known for playing the mother in a hit US 1980s sitcom.

item.title: NSW and WA take different approaches in wake of shark attacks
item.description: A young mother is fighting for life and two families are in mourning following savage maulings.

item.title: Caulfield Cup gets prize money boost in time for 150th running
item.description: The changes put the race in line with the Melbourne Cup, and will help European horses qualify.

item.title: Newsagency addresses ‘$100 million secret’ as massive Powerball prize remains unclaimed
item.description: The winning ticket was purchased more than a year ago.

item.title: Who left Farmer Wants A Wife? Five women exit the show in shock departures
item.description: Some of the women confessed the bombshell reasons behind their decision.

item.title: Sunrise’s Edwina Bartholomew opens up about the ‘toughest time’ her family faced
item.description: The Sunrise host said one life-changing move helped turn everything around.

item.title: Sarah Tuck’s Japanese beef udon is the cosy dinner everyone will want this winter
item.description: Warm up with this comforting bowl of beef, noodles and flavour-packed broth.

item.title: Brooklyn Beckham’s new DoorDash advert reignites family feud claims
item.description: David and Victoria Beckham were in LA to attend the football legend’s Walk of Fame ceremony, but their eldest son was notably absent.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle respond to UK’s social media ban for under 16s
item.description: ‘The burden cannot rest solely on parents and children.’

item.title: Struggling Pizza Hut chain to be sold by parent company Yum Brands for $A3.8 billion
item.description: The parent company says the pizza chain has struggled with outdated stores and growing competition.

item.title: Jockey Billy Loughnane and Bow Echo tough it out in ‘messy’ St James’s Palace race at Royal Ascot
item.description: ‘The horse definitely got me out of trouble.’

item.title: Russian warship opens fire at British yacht in the English Channel
item.description: Shots were fired at a civilian vessel near Isle of Wight as tensions between London and Moscow intensify.

item.title: Coolmore considers Mission Central for Everest after win in Group 1 King Charles III Stakes
item.description: Trainer Aidan O’Brien and jockey Ryan Moore now have a complete set of Royal Ascot Group 1 wins and Coolmore has The Everest on its mind.

item.title: FBI foils alleged terror plot to attack Donald Trump’s White House UFC event
item.description: The FBI director said in a post on X that ‘multiple individuals are now in custody.’

item.title: Armed group take woman and child from Ebola clinic in DRC as deadly outbreak spreads
item.description: Community distrust in health workers is hampering efforts to contain the spread.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands reaches $12m settlement, ending legal stoush
item.description: A bitter legal battle between the shock jock and his former employer has come to an end after ARN Media agreed to pay up.

item.title: Serena Williams to make grand slam return at Wimbledon alongside sister Venus
item.description: The All England Club have confirmed a wildcard for the 44-year-old.

item.title: Billions to keep flowing in childcare fee battle locking in 15 per cent pay rise for workers
item.description: It's hoped higher wages and a renewed pledge from centres on fees will prove a boost for the sector and a boon for parents.

item.title: MasterChef star Steph De Sousa honours late sister with favourite recipe for MND Awareness Month
item.description: This apple sour cream slice is easy, affordable and packed with flavour.

item.title: British TV legend Jeremy Clarkson announces cancer diagnosis in new episode of Clarkson’s Farm
item.description: ‘If treatment is all successful, I’ll see you next season - and if it isn’t, I won’t.’

item.title: Hundreds of Western Australian residents cop 25 per cent Supagas LPG gas bill increase amid Middle East market impacts
item.description: For many of the affected households in WA, there are no alternative providers to turn to.

item.title: Protestors crash Pauline Hanson’s first National Press Club speech
item.description: A banner dropped down behind the One Nation leader during her speech, as protestors rallied outside.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands reveals mother undergoing cancer treatment after news of $12 million settlement with former employer ARN
item.description: The radio shock jock settled with his former employer after he was sacked from the long-running Kyle and Jackie O Show.

item.title: Norway's crown princess Mette-Marit has successful lung transplant
item.description: It comes after the 52-year-old was told she likely had only a year to live.

item.title: Middle East war: Read the 14-point draft agreement between the US and Iran
item.description: It details the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz and a commitment that Iran will never produce a nuclear weapon.

item.title: Trump says Iran deal avoided global ‘economic catastrophe’
item.description: ‘I didn’t want to see economic catastrophe. If you kept this going, that could have happened.’

item.title: Lilo and Stitch child star Daveigh Chase dead at 35 following hospitalisation
item.description: The actress was also well known for her award-winning role in The Ring.

item.title: US Judge rips into Gilgo Beach serial killer while handing down life sentence
item.description: ‘You are disgusting — a despicable man, if you are a man at all.’

item.title: Workings of Pauline Hanson banner stunt revealed as investigation launched into National Press Club protest
item.description: An activist group has claimed responsibility for the stunt.

item.title: Laurie Daley responds to calls to overhaul Blues team for State of Origin decider
item.description: The under-fire coach is reluctant to rush into any big calls despite the disastrous loss.

item.title: Sam Kerr set to join Gotham FC after ending career at Chelsea
item.description: The Matildas superstar is set to return to a former club in a blockbuster move.

item.title: Jackie O vows to continue multimillion-dollar legal battle with ARN
item.description: It comes just days after co-host Kyle Sandilands settled for $12.09m.

item.title: Controversy erupts over England captain Harry Kane penalty tactic at World Cup: ‘Ban it’
item.description: The deliberate ploy helped the Three Lions score the opening goal.

item.title: National Press Club rejects David Sharaz’s membership after GetUp’s stunt during Pauline Hanson address
item.description: The National Press Club has made a big move after David Sharaz’s GetUp lowered a banner during Pauline Hanson’s Canberra address.

item.description: Emotions were high after the game when the Maroons’ star revealed the emotional words ringing in his ears.

item.description: Foreign Minister Penny Wong issued a warning as she welcomed the deal.

item.description: ‘Don’t know who he’s talking to, but we’re not sure there’s any accuracy in any of that.’

item.description: ‘Every time you get the chance to pull on the green and gold it means something special.’

item.description: The attacker, often dubbed ‘Captain America’, has been training away from teammates.

item.title: ‘Cruel’ abortion bill torpedoed after dramatic night in South Australia’s parliament
item.description: It was the third unsuccessful attempt in recent years to tighten the law in the state.

item.title: No-confidence vote awaits Victoria Premier Jacinta Allan as Liberals move to oust her before election
item.description: It comes as Allan faces internal pressure over Labor’s tanking poll numbers.

item.title: ‘Battling’ Bobby Hill still ‘a work in progress’ for Collingwood after returning to training
item.description: ‘Deep conversations’ with his father figure coach have revealed the Norm Smith medallist is a long way off playing footy.

item.title: Tully Lou says ‘everything has to go’ as it shuts down after 14 years
item.description: The activewear operation had previously discussed its challenges with customers.

item.description: The chart-topper’s legal team said she is in fear for her own personal safety.

item.description: The fallen Wallabies star and his wife have gone nuclear and accused the NRL of ‘crazy double standards’.

item.description: The massive 1200-year-old oak has failed to sprout leaves this spring.

item.description: A 69-year-old man has been charged with assault occasioning actual bodily harm.

item.description: The corporate regulator said the outcome is ‘one of the first of its kind globally’.

item.description: The much-loved goalkicker is fighting for life in hospital.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: Two people rushed to hospital after Sylvania crash traps elderly man
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Russia vows to retaliate after Ukraine hits Moscow refinery in major attack
item.description: Shocking footage captured the moment the roof of a storage tanker was sent flying during the attack on the Russian capital.

item.title: Man arrested after three-year-old critically injured in crocodile enclosure at UK zoo
item.description: The three-year-old child, who police say did not know the man, remains in hospital in a critical condition.

item.title: Aussie jockey Zac Lloyd enjoys maiden Royal Ascot triumph with Moonfall
item.description: The 22-year-old was all smiles after a landmark Royal Ascot winner on his ‘only bullet for the week’.

item.title: Toyota bZ4X recalled
item.description: The car giant warns there are no warning signs or symptoms ahead of the issue occurring.

item.title: Norway’s Crown Princess Mette-Marit undergoes lung transplant days after son sentenced for rape
item.description: The future queen of Norway has been battling chronic lung disease since 2018 and was put on a transplant list 12 days ago.

item.title: Geelong coach Chris Scott addresses concern over Jeremy Cameron’s arm issue
item.description: Alarm bells started to ring during the game when the gun forward did not look ‘right’.

item.title: First tankers cross Strait of Hormuz sparking tentative relief as US Vice President JD Vance slams Israel for getting in the way of peace
item.description: Trump’s memorandum for peace also called for the ‘permanent termination’ of the war in Lebanon but Vice President JD Vance has since taken aim at behaviour in the Middle East he said was ‘not acceptable’.

item.title: JLR partnering with Stellantis on new Land Rover Defender models
item.description: Land Rover will expand the Defender lineup in the United States with a new model using underpinnings shared with Jeep parent Stellantis.

item.title: Gatwick Airport ground crew in London find body of man hidden in landing gear of Air Arabia flight
item.description: Police have launched an investigation after workers found the man in the aircraft’s landing gear.

item.title: World Cup in total shock as Canada star Ismael Kone suffers serious leg injury against Qatar
item.description: The injured star could not believe his own eyes and the rival who caused it was in serious distress.

item.title: 2027 Porsche Taycan update includes fake gear shifts
item.description: The updated Porsche Taycan may look the same, but comes with an updated infotainment system and the option of virtual gear shifts.

item.title: Tony Modra’s wife Erica shares ‘amazing’ update on AFL great’s condition after truck crash
item.description: ‘He’s not going to be the same good-looking Tony Modra, he’s going to have some scars.’

item.title: Woolworths supermarket locks down as pack of allegedly knife-wielding teens cause chaos
item.description: Police found no evidence of weapons when they arrested two young teen boys.

item.title: Maroons star Selwyn Cobbo gets ‘10 out of 10’ for State of Origin masterclass at the MCG
item.description: ‘The way he got us on the front foot ... it was just mad.’

item.title: 2026 CarExpert Choice winner: Best Luxury PHEV SUV
item.description: The Volvo XC90 T8 offers a spacious and upscale cabin and comfortable ride quality, plus a well-sorted plug-in hybrid powertrain.

item.title: Shannon Noll recreates viral shoey moment with Sunrise reporter at Mick Fanning Charity Golf Day
item.description: The hilarious reunion was nine years in the making.

item.title: Hyundai Inster recalled
item.description: Hyundai Australia will recall more than 800 Inster electric cars due to a fault which could cause a loss of drive.

item.title: Volkswagen Polo, T-Cross and T-Roc recalled
item.description: Volkswagen is recalling certain examples of its Polo, T-Cross and T-Roc as their instrument clusters may fail to illuminate.

item.title: Lionel Messi and family issue statement after ‘irresponsible’ false claims of ill father Jorge’s death
item.description: The superstar was in tears during Argentina’s World Cup opener and now he’s been forced to open up on the sad situation.
